mapper.select: select user_code ,employee_no ,password_hash ,name ,is_lock ,first_login_yn ,sys_ck from users where employee_no = #{employeeNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_auto_login ( token_hash, -- 토큰 SHA-256 해시값 (PK) user_code, -- 사용자 코드 expires_at, -- 만료일시 created_at, -- 생성일시 last_used_at, -- 마지막 사용일시 user_agent, -- 브라우저 정보 ip_addr -- IP 주소 ) VALUES ( #{tokenHash}, #{userCode}, SYSDATE + (#{ttlSeconds} / 86400), SYSDATE, SYSDATE, #{userAgent}, #{ipAddr} )
mapper.select:
SELECT u.user_code, u.employee_no, u.password_hash, u.name, u.email, u.phone, u.is_lock, sys_ck, u.first_login_yn FROM user_auto_login t
JOIN users u ON u.user_code = t.user_code
WHERE t.token_hash = #{tokenHash} AND t.expires_at > SYSDATE AND u.is_lock = '0'

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT i.issue_code AS issueCode, p.project_name AS projectName, i.title AS subject, TO_CHAR(i.due_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS dueDate FROM issues i JOIN projects p ON p.project_code = i.project_code WHERE i.assignee_code = #{userCode} AND i.due_at IS NOT NULL AND TRUNC(i.due_at) = TRUNC(SYSDATE) ORDER BY i.due_at ASC, i.issue_code DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= #{n}
